rejected_or_deferred_branches.reason: No unique union@20/50/100 rescues over reconstructed current baseline; worse than artist_neighbor_scene_v2 on the Gangsta Gangsta near miss.

remaining_gap_diagnosis.label_or_gt_ambiguity: Some remaining misses conflict with explicit user constraints, so they should be hand-audited before building narrow retrievers around them.
remaining_gap_diagnosis.likely_new_source_needed: Lyric/hidden-target cases and sparse-tag cases remain weak; current lyrics dense branch and catalog tags do not reliably express them.
remaining_gap_diagnosis.retriever_fixable_now: scene/era/tag/popularity and visual text-to-image are demonstrably fixable with current catalog/vector sources.
remaining_gap_diagnosis.state_or_resolver_blocked: Some artist-neighbor misses are blocked before retrieval. Example: Mr. Bungle style-reference resolved to the wrong catalog artist, so artist-neighbor retrieval has no useful seed.
